note: EKUBO V3 (v3.1.1 till-based singleton CL; partly verified — the genuine runtime is the mandatory production surface). FERMI-SHAPED snapshot (fermiSwapper = the MEVCaptureRouter; vault = the CORE singleton holding the till inventory) so the fermi harness (loadFermiSnapshots / verifyFermiBytecodeIntegrity / pinFermiBlockTimestamp / etchFermiGraph) is reused verbatim. The QUOTE path touches no token slots (the settlement runs only in the SWAP path) so the token repoint is pricing-neutral. REPLAY REQUIRES --hardfork osaka (the runtime executes CLZ, EIP-7939). The slot union covers the pool's ENTIRE tick territory (oversize quotes both directions walk all initialized liquidity).

contracts.role: Ekubo Core singleton (virtual pools + the till inventory; the snapshot vault)
